message: All acceptance criteria met: test_agent_identity.py imports from langgraph_pipeline.slack submodules (identity, notifier, poller) with no importlib/legacy references; scripts/plan-orchestrator.py deleted; no stale test_auto_pipeline* pycache; all 64 migrated tests pass; full suite of 1313 tests pass. Build command references deleted plan-orchestrator.py but deletion is the stated goal of this task.
